facebook.caption: 4.4 stars. 220 reviews. A pho spot on Đường Nguyễn Trãi that locals keep going back to. Phở Nam Định serves the real deal, slow-cooked broth, proper herbs, and none of the tourist markup. Show up early. Bowls go fast. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Hot broth poured right in front of you. Phở Nam Định at 8 Đường Nguyễn Trãi is 4.4 stars for a reason. This is the bowl you actually want in Phu Quoc.
